caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark blazer over a white shirt, stands on a stage giving a presentation. Behind him is a large screen displaying a dark blue background with geometric lines and the text "CRYPTO-ML LTD." beneath which are several bullet points: "Let's jump the hype-train!", "A large scale crypto-analysis platform", "Heavy compute data analysis, Transform, Fetch...", and "Going deep running predictions on LSTMs". At the bottom of the screen, the text asks, "CAN WE SURVIVE THE 2017 CRYPTO-CRAZE?". The bottom of the presentation slide features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hands and shifts his posture, moving from a neutral stance to raising his right hand and then leaning slightly toward a podium, while the screen content remains static.
